name: Private Fairway Orem
about: Private Fairway Orem is an indoor golf training studio providing 24-hour access to TrackMan 4 simulator technology. The venue offers memberships with unlimited or session-based bookings, featuring detailed swing analysis through 26 club and ball data points. It is designed for golfers seeking to improve their game through technology-driven practice and virtual play on over 250 courses. The studio emphasizes convenience with key fob access and an online booking system, allowing members to practice according to their own schedules without formal commitments or long-term contracts.
why_golfers_like_it: Unlimited 24-hour access to premium TrackMan technology
Data-driven swing analysis to lower handicap by 6-10 strokes
Flexible membership options with no long-term contracts
Private, self-directed practice environment with key fob access

food_and_drink.notes: No food or drink service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitor with 3 camera angles

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own clubs to use with the TrackMan simulator system.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, food and drink services are not mentioned as available at the venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on the number of players and pace of play, but virtual golf sessions can be booked in 50-minute blocks.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue is not marketed as kid-friendly and appears to cater to serious golfers and adults.
